summary: Completed testing of AdminPartnerOpsPanel and partner progress API endpoints. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed AdminPartnerOpsPanel visibility in admin partner view with all required features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AdminPartnerOpsPanel and partner progress endpoints fully tested. Updated test file to match new micro-step configuration (27 total: Posizionamento 4, Masterclass 6, Videocorso 7, Funnel 5, Lancio 5). The panel shows on right side of admin partner view (accessed via 'Vista Partner' button or 'Visualizza' on a partner). Partner dashboard (left side) correctly does NOT show micro-steps or admin notes.

features_tested.GET /api/admin/partners/{id}/progress re: PASS - Returns posizionamento (4), masterclass (6), videocorso (7), funnel (5), lancio (5) = 27 total micro-steps with status/label/note fields
features_tested.PATCH /api/admin/partners/{id}/progress: PASS - Updates status and auto-computes macro status (not_started/in_progress/completed)
PASS - Completing posizionamento sets phase to F3
features_tested.PATCH /api/admin/partners/{id}/progress/: PASS - Note saved and retrieved correctly
features_tested.AdminPartnerOpsPanel visible only in Vis: PASS - Panel shows on right side only when mode=partner AND role=admin
features_tested.Micro-steps expandable for each phase in: PASS - Clicking macro step expands/collapses micro-steps list
features_tested.Note inline editable for each micro-step: PASS - '+ nota' button opens input, save/cancel buttons work
features_tested.Progress bar global and per-phase in pan: PASS - Shows 'X/27 (Y%)' global and 'X/N' per macro step
features_tested.Partner dashboard (left) does NOT show m: PASS - Only shows 5 macro steps with status (in corso/bloccato/completato)
features_tested.Status cycles: non iniziato -> in corso: PASS - Clicking micro-step cycles through statuses
features_tested.Partner phase auto-updates after status: PASS - Phase badge updates when progress changes
